# Templates

Templates are the core building blocks of Scaffold. Each template is a self-contained directory that defines the files, folders, and variable placeholders for a generated project.

## In This Section

- **Directory Structure** -- How template packs are organized on disk
- **File Roles** -- What each file in a template pack does
- **Custom Templates** -- How to author your own template packs

Start with [Directory Structure](/docs/templates/directory-structure/) for an overview of the template layout.
